title: Laboratory Technology Program Educational Objectives
content:
Laboratory Technology Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To ensure that students gain fundamental theoretical knowledge and practical vocational skills in the field of laboratory technology.

2. To raise awareness and knowledge regarding laboratory safety, occupational health, and environmental consciousness.

3. To equip students with the competency to effectively use modern laboratory equipment and information technologies in professional applications.

4. To educate individuals who can analyze professional problems, think critically, and develop effective solutions.

5. To develop students’ written and verbal communication skills so they can express themselves clearly and effectively.

6. To instill ethical values, teamwork skills, and a sense of responsibility.

7. To support graduates in developing sustainable skills related to lifelong learning, career management, and following developments in the sector.
